steps.description: The simpleaffy package in R/Bioconductor was used to calculate MAS5.0 calls.
Normalization was performed by quantile normalization with respect to a defined reference set.

raw_text: The simpleaffy package in R/Bioconductor was used to calculate MAS5.0 calls. These values are not normalized. Normalization was performed by quantile normalization with respect to a defined reference set.
